name: Jimmy Page

acts.description: Sexual relationship with Lori Maddox beginning when she was 14; reportedly kept her isolated in hotels during the relationship

behavior_summary: Pursued and had a relationship with Lori Maddox beginning when she was 14. She has spoken openly about it. He has never addressed it. Led Zeppelin's legacy machinery has ensured near-total immunity.

art.summary: One of the greatest rock guitarists in history. Led Zeppelin is foundational to essentially all heavy music. The guitar work is genuinely transcendent.

verdict.blurb: Stairway to Heaven is one of the greatest pieces of music recorded in the 20th century. He has never been asked to answer for the 14-year-old. These are both true.
